name: Orchid
notes: Orchid (Noor Siddiqui, founded 2019/2020) is a reproductive genetics / preconception genetic testing company based in San Francisco. Domain is orchidhealth.com. Note: orchid.com is a separate Web3/VPN company.

name: Swish
notes: Multiple companies named Swish exist. Best match for a notable startup is Swish Analytics (sports predictions/analytics, SF, founded 2014). Could also be Swish Robotics or Swish Brand Experiences — no additional context to disambiguate.

name: Different Health
notes: Could not identify a company named 'Different Health' in any startup database. No Crunchbase, PitchBook, or web presence found under this exact name. Insufficient information to identify.

name: Fable
notes: Best match is Fable, the social reading/book club platform founded by Padmasree Warrior in 2019, headquartered in Palo Alto, CA. Multiple other Fable companies exist (Fable Food, Fable Studio, Fable Fintech) — no domain given to disambiguate.

name: Aunu Skincare
notes: Aunu (marketed as AUNU Beauty) is a medical-grade Mānuka honey skincare brand founded by Jenn Krouse, headquartered in New York, NY. Website is aunubeauty.com.

name: CompleteSleep
notes: Complete Sleep (mycompletesleep.com) is a sleep apnea treatment startup founded by Andres Moran (prev. co-founder of Fundera). HQ at 130 E 59th St, 17th Floor, New York, NY 10022.

name: GatherSet
notes: GatherSet is an AI-powered event management platform founded by Claude Cimeus, based in Chicago, IL. Website is gatherset.com.

name: BluMint
notes: BluMint is a gaming/streaming platform (challenge streamers for cash) founded by Columbia undergrads in 2022, headquartered in New York, NY. Primary website is blumint.com. Note: blumint.co is a separate Estonian digital marketing company.

name: Boomband
notes: Boomband is an AI-native talent marketplace founded by Jeff Taylor (creator of Monster.com), headquartered in Charlestown, Rhode Island. Raised $4M seed in February 2026.

name: Realm
notes: Best match is Realm (realmhome.com), a home renovation/equity platform founded in NYC in 2019, backed by GGV Capital. Multiple 'Realm' companies exist; no domain provided to confirm.

name: InTheLoop
notes: Possible match: IntheLoop (intheloop.io / intheloopai.com), a business/productivity software startup founded 2023, HQ Newark, DE, backed by NSF and J4.Ventures. However multiple InTheLoop companies exist globally; no domain or context provided to confirm this is the correct one.

name: Rondah
notes: Rondah AI builds AI receptionists for dental practices, founded 2024, headquartered in New York, NY. Raised $1.8M pre-seed. Domain is rondah.com (per company name; website URL not confirmed from search results but domain matches company name pattern).
